summary: TWO_COLUMN Laurent coefficients. LEFT axes with bar chart of a_k for k=-5..5; BLUE negative powers, RED k=0, GREEN positive powers. ValueTracker s_tr morphs between e^(1/z) coefficients (1/|k|! for k≤0) and 1/(z(z-1)) coefficients (-1/z - 1 - z - z² - ...). always_redraw bars + dynamic title + color legend.
